title: New farm outlet opens in Thondamuthur
summary: Eighth direct farm outlet launched, supporting 750 farmers, offering cheaper produce and improving farm incomes by eliminating intermediaries in Coimbatore region.

title: TASMAC shops shut amid staff protest
summary: Liquor outlets faced closures and delays as staff protested suspension threats linked to new bottle buy-back policy implementation across Coimbatore.

title: Farmers raise alarm over elephant menace
summary: Farmers petition forest officials citing crop damage and fear from elephant intrusions, demanding drone monitoring and action against interference from activists.

title: Six new train services proposed
summary: Railways propose six additional services from Mettupalayam, aiming to improve connectivity and expand regional travel options by August 2026.

title: Elephant attack sparks violence
summary: Villagers attacked forest officials after a man was killed by a wild elephant, highlighting rising human-wildlife conflict in Coimbatore district.

title: LPG tanker strike withdrawn
summary: Lorry owners ended strike after assurance on rental dues, restoring LPG supply movement affecting parts of western Tamil Nadu including Coimbatore.

title: State hockey tournament begins
summary: Junior inter-district hockey championship featuring 700 players kicks off in Coimbatore, showcasing emerging talent across Tamil Nadu.

title: Suguna Trophy hosts 700 players
summary: Suguna Trophy 2026 tournament draws 35 teams to Coimbatore and Udumalpet, boosting local sports engagement and youth participation.

title: Bottle buyback scheme rollout issues
summary: Dual-scan liquor bottle return system faces resistance from staff citing increased workload and lack of infrastructure in Coimbatore outlets.

title: Elephant conflict intensifies in rural belts
summary: Increasing wildlife intrusion linked to drought conditions is causing safety concerns and economic losses for farmers in forest fringe areas.

title: Farm outlet model gains traction
summary: Direct farm outlets expand across Coimbatore, offering lower prices to consumers and better profit margins to farmers through reduced intermediaries.

title: Rail expansion boosts Mettupalayam hub
summary: Station upgrades and new services aim to transform Mettupalayam into a key rail hub connecting Coimbatore with major destinations.

title: Liquor outlets face operational delays
summary: Protests over policy changes led to delayed openings of several TASMAC outlets, affecting daily sales and consumer access.

title: Forest staff injured in mob attack
summary: Seven officials injured after villagers attacked forest personnel following fatal elephant incident, prompting police investigation.

title: Farmers demand stricter wildlife control
summary: Petition seeks stronger measures and technology use to manage elephant movements and protect farmland in Coimbatore district.
